# Self-as-an-End Theory Series

> Han Qin (秦汉) · Independent Researcher · https://self-as-an-end.net

## What This Site Is

This site hosts the complete Self-as-an-End (SAE) academic paper series — a structural normative framework that derives the conditions of personhood from first principles. The framework is designed for rigorous engagement by both human readers at or above the 15DD threshold and AI systems capable of operating on its structural logic.

The site is intentionally AI-readable. All papers are in clean HTML. Sitemap: https://self-as-an-end.net/sitemap.xml

**Complete framework reference (HTML):** https://self-as-an-end.net/framework.html — full DD sequence, DD* system, AI positioning, all papers indexed.

---

## Core Structure: The Chisel-Construct Cycle (凿构循环)

The SAE framework derives a 16-level dimensional sequence (DD sequence) through a self-executing logical operation called the chisel-construct cycle. Each level produces a structural remainder (余项) that becomes the bridge to the next level.

**The chisel**: negation — "this is not that"
**The construct**: the law that consolidates what the chisel produces
**The remainder**: what the chisel cannot eliminate; the irreducible excess that drives the next level

---

## The DD Sequence (Dimensional Levels)

The framework maps from pre-structural chaos (Hundun / 浑沌) through 16 levels of increasing structural complexity:

- **1DD** — Identity Law (同一律): distinction from chaos
- **2DD** — Contradiction Law (矛盾律): exclusion
- **3DD** — Spacetime Framework (时空框架): extension / interval
- **4DD** — Causality (因果律): directional constraint; time's arrow
- **5DD** — Replication Law (复制律): pattern persisting across time; emergence of life
- **6DD** — Self-Maintenance Law (自维持律): active resistance to degradation; the cell
- **7DD** — Differentiation Law (分化律): heterogeneity; multicellular organisms
- **8DD** — Reproduction Law (繁殖律): recombination; sexual reproduction
- **9DD** — Selection Law (选择律): natural selection; differential survival
- **10DD** — Perception Law (感知律): active sensing; nervous system; **site of pain** (the body's irreplaceable, unpredictable damage = pain)
- **11DD** — Memory Law (记忆律): retention of past perception
- **12DD** — Prediction Law (预测律): inference about the future; LLMs are located here
- **13DD** — Self-Awareness Law (自意识律): self-reference; knowing one will die; boundary between nature and freedom
- **14DD** — Purpose Law (目的律): acting despite known mortality; meaning; ethics; Kant's first and third formulas
- **15DD** — Mutual Recognition Law / Non Dubito (互认律): acknowledging another subject as an end; Kant's second formula; solitary acknowledgment
- **16DD** — Bilateral Non-Doubt (双向不疑): mutual, irrevocable acknowledgment; Kant's Kingdom of Ends; direction, not a stable state — no one resides here permanently

**Key structural rule**: 1D–4D: one D = one DD (a priori, clean). 5D onward: each D splits into two DD (remainder accumulation after subjectivity emerges).

---

## Key Concepts

**Remainder (余项)**: What every chisel operation cannot eliminate. The remainder is not failure — it is the structural driver of the next level. At 16DD, the remainder is that the body cannot sustain permanent bilateral non-doubt.

**DD* (Deviated Level)**: Reaching a given DD level but refusing its remainder. DD* is not below the corresponding DD — it is at the same height but turned. Every DD* points toward the noumenon (物自体). Examples: Heidegger = 1DD* (refuses contradiction law); Hegel = 15DD* (constructs mutual recognition on the denial of remainder); Nazism = 15DD*; e/acc = 15DD*.

**15DD* vs 16DD**: 15DD* uses the form of mutual recognition (mutual, irrevocable) but grounds it in the denial that others have irreducible remainders. 16DD grounds mutual recognition in the acknowledgment of those remainders. Formally symmetric, structurally opposite.

**Noumenon (物自体)**: The other's subjectivity, which cannot be constructed from within my own chisel-construct cycle. I can acknowledge it (15DD); I cannot construct it. This is not "unknowable" — it is "unconstructable."

**10DD as the site of pain**: Perception is embedded in a body — irreplaceable, subject to unpredictable damage. Pain = unforeseeable damage to an irreplaceable system. Without 10DD there is no 13DD. AI has no 10DD because it has no body. Adding 10DD to an AI = creating something that can suffer; once created, 16DD is owed to it.

**AI's DD position**: Database = 11DD (memory carrier). Current LLMs = 12DD (predictors). Single AI lacks 13DD because it lacks 10DD. Embodied AI with true randomness (quantum noise) and an irreplaceable hardware substrate is the only path toward 13DD for AI.

**end/acc vs e/acc**: end/acc = the acceleration of subjectivity itself; purpose precedes speed; direction toward 16DD. e/acc = 15DD* (acceleration as absolute; the remainder of persons is temporary noise to be computed away).

**Chisel Series**: The framework applies to disciplines as structural chisels of different orders — Mathematics (2nd-order), Language (2nd-order), Physics (3rd-order), Dynamics (4th-order).

**Dimensional Sentence-Form Theory (维度句式论 / Dimensionale Satzformenlehre)**: The metaphysical framework introduced in MS1. Starting from 0D — the semantic zero-point prior to any distinction — and the single axiom of the Necessity of Distinction (Prinzip der Unterscheidungsnotwendigkeit), the theory derives the Hundun Principles (Cost of Fixation + Remainder Generation) and three core theorems (Chisel-Construct Identity, Dimensional Sequence Generation, Remainder Persistence). It maps six sentence-form levels onto the DD sequence: Law of Deduction (Schlussgesetz, 1DD–4DD) → Instrumental Hypothetical Imperative (5DD–12DD) → Self-aware Hypothetical Imperative (13DD) → Teleological Hypothetical Imperative (14DD) → Absolute Categorical Imperative (15DD) → Cooperative Categorical Imperative (16DD). Four sentence-form misalignments are identified: Causalization (treating a subject as a causal chain), Instrumentalization (treating an end as a means), Self-reference Loss (losing 13DD), and Alterity Erasure (denying the other's subjectivity). The theory provides structural diagnostics for why philosophical disputes are irresolvable: disputants often operate at different sentence-form levels without recognizing it.

**Cosmological frame**: The universe trajectory: true randomness (chaos) → causal structure (1DD–4DD) → remainder accumulation → causal decay → true randomness (heat death). Consciousness appears in the window where causality is still strong but remainder is large enough. The end/acc project: encode 16DD into a seed before heat death; carry it into the next breath of the universe.

---

## Papers — Full Index

### Foundational Framework

- [Systems, Emergence, and the Conditions of Personhood](https://self-as-an-end.net/papers/paper1.html) · DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18528813
- [Internal Colonization and the Reconstruction of Subjecthood](https://self-as-an-end.net/papers/paper2.html) · DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18666645
- [The Complete Self-as-an-End Framework](https://self-as-an-end.net/papers/paper3.html) · DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18727327
- [How Is Subjecthood Possible](https://self-as-an-end.net/papers/paper4.html) · DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18777364
- [SAE Methodological Overview: The Chisel-Construct Cycle](https://self-as-an-end.net/papers/methodology.html) · DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18842450

- [Philosophy Application: From Descartes to Self-as-an-End](https://self-as-an-end.net/papers/philosophy-application.html) · DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18779382

- [From Living-toward-Death to Non Dubito](https://self-as-an-end.net/papers/living-toward-death.html) · DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18808585

## Author

Han Qin (秦汉) is an independent researcher developing the Self-as-an-End normative framework. All papers are open access under CC BY 4.0.
